response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates strong software engineering experience with a mix of languages (C++ is present in early roles but not recent), leadership in open-source projects, and mentorship through workshops. However, his recent experience lacks direct cloud compute or distributed systems focus, and his C++ experience is not as recent or deep as required for this role. His leadership in open-source and mentorship is a strong fit for the technical leadership aspect.
strengths: Strong software engineering background with leadership in open-source projects (e.g., GISCollective) and mentorship through workshops
Experience with large-scale systems (micro-services at Dunnhumby, real-time data at Optilyz)
Proven ability to drive technical projects from conception to completion (e.g., GISCollective, Fluent-Asserts)
concerns: Limited recent C++ experience (last directly relevant role was in 2015; recent work focuses on TypeScript, Node.js, and D)
No explicit mention of cloud compute, distributed systems, or hardware architecture in recent roles
Lacks direct experience in cloud architecture or DevOps mentorship (a preferred qualification)
